ab: Ini haw kisu, u maan saw ku cakayen nu misu?
en: A: Hello, what do you want to buy?

ab: A micakay kaku tu kupu.
en: B: I want to buy a cup.

ab: Ini haw kisu, u maan saw ku cakayen nu misu?
en: A: Hello, what do you want to buy?

ab: Mangalay kaku a micakay tu tuper.
en: B: I want to buy a hat.

ab: A micakay kaku tu kupu, pacakay haw kamu?
ch: A:我要買杯子，你們有賣嗎?
en: A: I want to buy a cup, do you sell them?

ab: Ira tu! a pina saw ku cacakayan nu misu?
en: B: Yes, how many do you want to buy?

ab: Pacakay haw kamu tu icep?
en: A: Do you sell betel nut?

ab: Awaay! Caay pacakay kami tu icep.
en: B: No, we don't sell betel nut.

ab: Mangalay kaku a micakay tu velac.
en: A: I want to buy rice.

ab: A pina saw a tavu ku nipicakay nu misu?
en: B: How many packs do you want to buy?

ab: Tuluen a tavu ku nipaveli i takuwan.
en: A: Give me three packs.

ab: A micakay kaku tu vunga.
en: A: I want to buy sweet potatoes.

ab: Awaaytu! maemintu a pacakayen ku vunga.
ch: B:沒有了! 地瓜都賣完了。
en: B: No more! All the potatoes are sold out.

ab: A micakay kaku tu simal, tusa a sinatuwik.
en: A: I want to buy two bottles of oil.

ab: Ca:cay tu a sinatuwikan ku usaw.
en: B: We only have one bottle left.

ab: Patadui hen isaw kaku a micakay tu litaul.
en: A: Go buy an egg for me.

ab: A pina saw a daduy ku nipicakay nu misu?
en: B: How many pounds do you want to buy?

ab: A pina saw a daduy ku nipicakay nu misu tu litaul?
en: A: How many pounds of eggs do you want to buy?

ab: A tusa a daduy ku nipicakay nu maku.
en: B: I want to buy two catties.

ab: A micakay kaku tu kenaw, tusaen a kamel.
en: A: I want to buy two green onions.

ab: Tulu tu a kamel ku usaw, hamisuen tu amin.
en: B: There are three left, all for you!

ab: Pina saw ku aca nina velac?
en: A: How much is this bag of rice?

ab: Cacay a tavu tusa a patekenan ku aca
en: B: $200 for a pack.

ab: Kumud han tusa a pulu’ ira ku cacay, tusa a pulu’ hanaw tu ku nipisausi.
en: A:The total is $21, just count $20.

ab: Ihu’ihu:, kisu!
en: B: That's very kind of you, thank you!

ab: Siwa a pulu’ ira ku lima kinian.
en: A: Here's $95.

ab: Tungalay nu maku ku nipicakay, edemaw ku cacay a patekenan.
ch: B:我再加買一點，好湊足100元。
en: B: I'll buy some more, so I can make up $100.

ab: Kumud han ku aca, lima a patekenan ira ku muketep.
en: A:All $510.

ab: Masa saw? anu limaen a patekenan ku nipaaca nu maku?
en: B: Count me in for $500, okay?

ab: Matekes isaw, masasaw a kelulen atudi ku aca?
ch: A:這個太貴了，可以再減一點嗎?
en: A: It's too expensive, can you reduce it a bit?

ab: A caay isaw, awaay tu ku kakelulen.
ch: B:不行，這個已經不能再減了。
en: B: No, this can't be reduced any further.

ab: Inian a piyangan ku alaan nu maku.
en: A: I'll take this packet of cookies.

ab: Tulu a pulu’ ku aca nina piyang, ira hen haw ku kangalayan?
ch: B:這餅乾30元，還需要別的東西嗎?
en: B: $30 for the cookies, anything else you need?
